dashboard.title: Company Ratings
dashboard.subtitle: View feedback from students whose applications you reviewed.
dashboard.noReviewsDescription: You haven't received any ratings from students yet. Ratings will appear here after you review applications.

reviews.rateCompanyDescription: How was your experience applying to this company? Your feedback helps other students.
reviews.commentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts about the application process...
reviews.submitError: Failed to submit rating. Please try again.

submit.title: Review Fee Payment
submit.subtitle: Pay the review fee to submit your application for {{scholarship}}.
submit.escrowNoticeDesc: Your payment is held securely. {{company}} will only receive the fee after they review your application and provide a decision. If they fail to review within the deadline, you will be automatically refunded.
